Date: 29 May 2026 | Subject: Sustainability-linked sukuk, crypto settlement pilot, cyber incident; MNPI/PDPA handling

This note contains non-public, price-sensitive information under the Exchange Main Market Listing Requirements and must not be circulated beyond the information barrier; closed period from 01–15 Jun 20 26 applies.

Financing: draft term sheet with Meranti Ridge Bank Berhad for RM250m SLS sukuk; initial pricing grid 4.55% with 5–15 bps greenium tied to Scope 2 intensity targets; covenant headroom EBITDA/Net Debt ≥ 3.0x; break fee RM2.5m; signing targeted 14-Jun-2026.

Commercial sensitivities: failure to meet Q4 2026 target reduces coupon step-down; preliminary external rating expected at A- (private) by Nusantara Ratings Sdn Bhd; not disclosed publicly.

Crypto/DPT pilot: subsidiary Fikrine Renewables Sdn Bhd tested ringgit-stable settlement for tokenised REC transfers on “KerisChain” sandbox; 3 internal transfers executed on 28–29 May; liquidity partner Kelantan Ridge Securities Sdn Bhd; no Exchange announcement yet.

Cyber incident: on 12-May an unauthorised access to SCADA historian caused a 3-hour data exfiltration risk; no operational downtime; internal forensic ticket ID: CY-20 26/05/12-α; supplier “AwanNet” notified; external notification deferred pending assessment; consider immediate trading blackout extension.

Insider list maintained under PDPA: current insiders include Encik Ariff Rahman (CFO, 011-6•••-3219, ariff.rahman@fikrine.energy.my) and Puan Saliza Mohd Yunus (Deal Principal, saliza.yunus@nimbuscap.my); do not add personal NRIC; store at https://portal.fikrine nergy.com/sec?doc=tm%2Fgw&id=9a7c-f_8.

Information barrier: Corporate Finance (“Project Palm”) room is walled off from Treasury and IR; any wall-crossing of lenders requires email consent and standard legends; avoid selective disclosure in lender teach-ins.

Investor communications: statements must avoid tipping; draft deck Line 7 currently implies 8% uplift from carbon credit arbitrage—remove until price discovery completes; do not distribute to buy-side before Exchange filing.

Note that this memo does not constitute a material adverse change and is not a profit estimate; references to crypto wallets here are generic and for educational awareness within staff training.
